arts.sum: "I've been at the club quite a long time, I've played in all the derby games and I have that feeling too. "It's the feeling you get from talking to everyone at the club, people on the street and fans everywhere.

arts.ttl: Sam Beukema: “Thiago Motta is a genius, he had me playing in midfield”
arts.sum: Sam Beukema, the Bologna defender linked with a potential move to Juventus in the upcoming January transfer window, recently shared insights about his experience under coach Thiago Motta in an interview with Cronache di spogliatoio. Reflecting on his time at Bologna, Beukema praised Motta’s innovative approach: “I called Thiago Motta a genius. When I arrived at Bologna, he asked me to play in midfield. I thought, ‘But I’m a central defender, what am I doing in midfield?’ Gradually, I understood his style of play. I started getting comfortable with having space behind me, which I wasn’t used to. arts.ttl: Juventus coach Thiago Motta reveals Unai Emery's 'great bluff' and Aston Villa stance
arts.sum: Motta played under Emery at Paris Saint-Germain between 2016 and 2018 and will face his former manager for the first time at Villa Park. Juventus boss Thiago Motta doesn't believe Unai Emery would settle for a point on Wednesday night after the Aston Villa manager claimed a draw would be a good result for his side.
